title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (v15 doctrine)
description: A three-way deliberation on Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion: legitimate grievance about a betrayed founding mission, or competitor using the courts to hobble a rival? v15 doctrine — Hitchens-grade contradiction, Frost-Nixon recall, distinct Aristotelian vantages. Voice: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS.
summary: A three-way deliberation on Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion: legitimate grievance about a betrayed founding mission, or competitor using the courts to hobble a rival? v15 doctrine — Hitchens-grade contradiction, Frost-Nixon recall, distinct Aristotelian vantages. Voice: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS.
